name: shardllm
description: Manifest-only research tooling for shard-aware large-model inference.

scripts.check: node --check ./bin/shardllm.mjs && node --check ./src/artifacts.mjs && node --check ./src/cli.mjs && node --check ./src/estimator.mjs && node --check ./src/execution-plan.mjs && node --check ./src/huggingface-client.mjs && node --check ./src/tensor-index.mjs
